target.sql_fulltext: select SUM(P__2),inner_select.par0, inner_select.par1, inner_select.par2, inner_select.par3, inner_select.par4, inner_select.par5, inner_select.par6, inner_select.par7, inner_select.par8, inner_select.par9, inner_select.par10, inner_select.par11, inner_select.par12, inner_select.par13, inner_select.par14, inner_select.par15, inner_select.par16, inner_select.par17, inner_select.par18, inner_select.par19, inner_select.par20, inner_select.par21, inner_select.par22, inner_select.par23, inner_select.par24, inner_select.par25, inner_select.par26, inner_select.par27, inner_select.par28, inner_select.par29, inner_select.par30, inner_select.par31 from (select SUM(a.GRANULARITYPERIOD) P__2 ,l.CELL_NAME_D par0, k.AZIMUTH par1, k.BEAMWIDTH par2, k.ENODEB_CN par3, a.CELL_NAME par4, k.CELL_TYPE par5, k.CELL_BAND par6, k.CELL_EARFCN par7, k.CELL_OPERATOR par8, k.ENODEB_IBGE_ID par9, k.ID_MASTER par10, k.ENODEB_MUNICIPALY par11, k.NETWORK par12, k.SITE_OPERATOR par13, :1 par14, k.ENODEB_REGION par15, k.SETOR_FISICO par16, k.SHARING_MODE par17, k.SIGLA_LOGICA par18, k.SITE_TYPE par19, k.ERB_FISICA par20, k.STATION_CODE par21, k.CELL_TAC par22, k.ENODEB_UF par23, k.SITE_VENDOR par24, k.SITE_VERSION par25, :2 par26, a.MECONTEXT par27, k.ENODEB_IBGE_ID par28, k.ENODEB_LATITUDE par29, k.ENODEB_LONGITUDE par30, k.ENODEB_NEIGHBORHOOD par31 from DBN0_ERI_RAN.LTE_EUTRANCELLRELATION a, DBN0_EXT_ENRICH.ENR_RADIO_4G_CELLS k, DBN0_EXT_ENRICH.V_ENR_RADIO_4G_CELLS l where a.CELL_NAME = k.CELL_NAME AND a.MECONTEXT = k.MOBILE_SITE_NAME AND a.CELLINDEX = l.CELL_ID_D(+) AND a.ENODEBID = l.ENODEB_ID(+) AND a.MEASSTARTTIME>=to_date(:3 ,'YYYYMMDDHH24MI') AND a.MEASSTARTTIME<to_date(:4 ,'YYYYMMDDHH24MI') AND k.STARTTIME>=to_date(:5 ,'YYYYMMDDHH24MI') AND k.STARTTIME<to_date(:6 ,'YYYYMMDDHH24MI') AND l.STARTTIME(+)>=to_date(:7 ,'YYYYMMDDHH24MI') AND l.STARTTIME(+)<to_date(:8 ,'YYYYMMDDHH24MI') group by l.CELL_NAME_D, a.CELL_NAME, k.ENODEB_CN, k.ENODEB_MUNICIPALY, l.ENODEB_NAME, k.ENODEB_REGION, k.ENODEB_UF, k.ERB_FISICA, k.ID_MASTER, a.MECONTEXT, k.SETOR_FISICO, k.SIGLA_LOGICA, k.SITE_OPERATOR, k.SITE_VENDOR, k.STATION_CODE, a.CELLINDEX, a.ENODEBID, k.AZIMUTH, k.BEAMWIDTH, k.CELL_BAND, k.CELL_EARFCN, k.CELL_OPERATOR, k.CELL_TAC, k.CELL_TYPE, k.ENODEB_IBGE_ID, k.ENODEB_LATITUDE, k.ENODEB_LONGITUDE, k.ENODEB_NEIGHBORHOOD, k.NETWORK, k.SHARING_MODE, k.SITE_TYPE, k.SITE_VERSION) inner_select group by inner_select.par0, inner_select.par1, inner_select.par2, inner_select.par3, inner_select.par4, inner_select.par5, inner_select.par6, inner_select.par7, inner_select.par8, inner_select.par9, inner_select.par10, inner_select.par11, inner_select.par12, inner_select.par13, inner_select.par14, inner_select.par15, inner_select.par16, inner_select.par17, inner_select.par18, inner_select.par19, inner_select.par20, inner_select.par21, inner_select.par22, inner_select.par23, inner_select.par24, inner_select.par25, inner_select.par26, inner_select.par27, inner_select.par28, inner_select.par29, inner_select.par30, inner_select.par31 order by inner_select.par0, inner_select.par3, inner_select.par4, inner_select.par10, inner_select.par11, inner_select.par13, inner_select.par14, inner_select.par15, inner_select.par16, inner_select.par18, inner_select.par20, inner_select.par21, inner_select.par23, inner_select.par24, inner_select.par26, inner_select.par27, inner_select.par1, inner_select.par2, inner_select.par5, inner_select.par6, inner_select.par7, inner_select.par8, inner_select.par9, inner_select.par12, inner_select.par17, inner_select.par19, inner_select.par22, inner_select.par25, inner_select.par28, inner_select.par29, inner_select.par30, inner_select.par31

stat.name: Total Number of Rowsets
stat.desc: Total number of rowsets received from underlying input

stat.name: Rowsets Leveraging Storage Aggregation
stat.desc: Number of rowsets leveraging storage aggregation pushdown
